zh.Gnandstein, Kohren-Sahlis, Sachsen, Germ: 多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 萊格可萊斯 波納格南德斯坦
zh.Gnandstein: 多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 萊格可萊斯 波納格南德斯坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz於大約1270年出生在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 萊格可萊斯 波納格南德斯坦時，他的父親Reinhard von Gnandstein32歲，母親Mrs. nn NN24歲。他於大約1298年與nn NN結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1328年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz于大约1270年出生在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 萊格可萊斯 波納格南德斯坦时，他的父亲Reinhard von Gnandstein32岁，母亲Mrs. nn NN24岁。他于大约1298年与nn NN结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1328年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Marschall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Hedwig, Juergen, Reinhard, Theresia, Wilfried.

German: occupational name for a man in the service of a member of the nobility, originally one who looked after the horses, Middle High German marschalc (from mar(c) ‘noble horse’ + schalk ‘servant’). In time the term came to be used for a military rank or a certain court official. Compare Marshall .
English: variant of   Marshall  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz was born about 1270, in Gnandstein, Kreis Borna, Leipzig, East Germany, his father, Reinhard von Gnandstein, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. nn NN, was 24. He married nn NN about 1298. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1328.

Il a épousé nn NN environ 1298. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1328.

Er hat um 1298 nn NN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1328.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich Marschall von Mockritzが約1270年に東德ベズイルク レイプズイグクレイス ボルナグナンドステインで生まれた時，父Reinhard von Gnandsteinは32歳，母Mrs. nn NNは24歳であった。約1298年にnn NNと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1328年以後に死去した。

ko.Gnandstein, Kohren-Sahlis, Sachsen, Germ: 동독 베지르크 레이p지그 크레이스 본아 그난드스타인
ko.Gnandstein: 동독 베지르크 레이p지그 크레이스 본아 그난드스타인
ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz(이)가 대략 1270년 동독 베지르크 레이p지그 크레이스 본아 그난드스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reinhard von Gnandstein(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. nn NN(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1298년 nn NN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1328년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Gnandstein, Kreis Borna, Bezirk Leipzig, Deutsche Demokratische Republik, seu pai, Reinhard von Gnandstein, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. nn NN, tinha 24 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz родился около 1270 г. в местности гнандстин, крис борна, безирк липзиг, Восточная Германия, его отцу по имени Reinhard von Gnandstein было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. nn NN, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени nn NN около 1298 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1328 г.
